title: Vivid Midnight Indulgence Irish Smoked Fish Pho
description: A pungent and refreshing Irish dish featuring smoked fish and rice vermicelli, perfect for a midnight craving. This vegan-friendly version of a traditional Pho substitutes fish sauce with a smoky miso.
instructions: Cook the rice vermicelli in a large pot of boiling water until al dente, about 8 minutes.
Drain the vermicelli and set aside.
In a large saucepan, combine the vegetable broth, miso paste, ginger, and garlic.
Whisk until the miso paste is dissolved, then bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the broth simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the smoked salmon fillets to the broth and poach for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Remove the salmon from the broth and let it cool slightly.
Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean saucepan, discarding the solids.
Add the cooked vermicelli to the broth and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
Slice the smoked salmon into thin pieces and add to the broth.
Stir in the lime juice and season with salt to taste.
Serve the Pho hot, garnished with thinly sliced scallions.
